# DOE Generation Instructions

> ⚠️ This document is a placeholder. Agent instructions have not yet been written.

## Purpose

Provide Copilot with instructions for generating a Design of Experiments (DOE) plan.

## What this file should cover

- Input data required (design parameters, tolerances, test objectives)
- DOE methodology (full factorial, fractional factorial, Taguchi, etc.)
- Expected output format
